overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action RPG showing a character in ancient Greek attire exploring a monumental temple complex at night. The character walks along wide stone terraces, passes through columned halls, and ascends grand staircases illuminated by fire braziers and blue ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple terrace with burning braziers

events.description: character turns right toward the columned building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide stone terrace toward the temple entrance, passing burning braziers and statues

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking ahead toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: large stone fire bowl with bright orange flames illuminating the terrace
massive sculptural figure of a sea creature atop a pedestal
tall fluted stone pillars supporting the temple structure
wide paved walkway with geometric stone patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide open terrace at night, passing large burning braziers that cast warm light against the cool blue sky. Massive stone statues and columns line the path as the character approaches a grand temple entrance, following a robed NPC ahead.

events.description: enters the covered columned area from the open terrace
character turns left toward the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the imposing columned entrance, passing robed NPCs and large decorative vases

notable_agents.action: robed temple figure standing near the columns

entered.detail: giant fluted pillars with ornate capitals supporting the temple roof
tall bronze-studded entrance doors at the end of the hall
blue-glowing lanterns mounted between the columns
large ceremonial urns with intricate patterns flanking the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand columned hall with massive stone pillars and blue lantern light. The space feels more enclosed than the terrace, with large wooden doors at the far end and decorative amphorae lining the path. The character passes robed NPCs and turns toward a grand staircase.

events.description: begins ascending the long stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase flanked by railings, moving steadily upward through the temple structure

entered.detail: wide flight of stone steps with decorative chain railings on both sides
ornate carved balustrades lining the staircase
decorative carved stone band running along the upper wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand ceremonial staircase enclosed by high stone walls and ornate railings. The lighting shifts to a mix of blue ambient light and warm firelight from a brazier above. The architecture features decorative friezes and the staircase continues steeply upward.

events.description: reaches a landing and transitions to a secondary staircase

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the secondary staircase, navigating the enclosed corridor-like stairwell with walls on both sides

entered.detail: narrower flight of steps continuing upward from the landing
smooth carved stone walls enclosing the stairwell
arched opening leading to a side chamber with blue light

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a landing and continues up a secondary, more enclosed staircase. The environment becomes darker and more corridor-like, with smooth stone walls and an arched doorway visible to the left. The character steadily climbs the final visible section of stairs toward the upper temple levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive open-air terrace into the increasingly enclosed and ascending depths of a monumental temple. It begins on a wide stone terrace under a cool blue night sky, where the character follows a robed NPC past burning braziers and massive statues toward a grand entrance. As the character steps inside, the scene shifts into a grand columned hall illuminated by blue lanterns and lined with decorative amphorae before turning toward a ceremonial staircase. The camera then ascends a steep flight of stairs enclosed by high stone walls and ornate friezes, where the lighting blends warm firelight with ambient blue tones. Finally, the environment narrows into a darker, corridor-like secondary staircase with smooth stone walls and arched doorways as the character climbs toward the upper temple levels.
